title: ETD-8 AVMH

{{Simple Image Block |image=Etd8.png |caption=ETD-8 AMVH, drawing by Einot Nus, posted in [[Backchat (Collaborative Log)|Backchat]], reposted by the official Auriellen Ground Forces account.}} '''Asquistea Verus di Mediu Hostilies''' (translated from [[Aurielleno]]: Hostile Environment Combat Uniform) (HECU, AVMH) is protective gear used by primarily Auriellen military personnel in hazardous and toxic environments, such as during chemical, biological, radiological, or nuclear (CBRN) strikes, and levels classified as [[:Category:Class 4|Class 4]] and above. It is used by the Auriellen Armed Forces, Cascadan Army, and Rama Saom's Security Department Rapid Response Unit, Strategic Deployment Force, and Special Tasks Squadron. The AVMH encompasses four parts: the Costem Liero Protela Integratem per Medius Pericluvos (CLPIMP), gas mask, chemical agent detector paper, gloves, and overboots. Additionally, various items, mainly protective vests such as the AGF's IOTV, Cascadan Army's LBE Vest, and others, are doctrinally worn over the CLIMP ==History== During an Auriellen Ground Forces operation In mid-2021, when the Cascadan Black League (Kǎsùdea Hěra Ligeu) perpetrated a series of terrorist attacks with chemical agents, deployed ground forces troops often complained about the anti-CBRN hazard suits, reporting feelings of unwellness and sickness several days after the attacks had been dealt with. Upon further investigation, it was found out that the equipment was faulty, letting chemicals leak into the suit and onto the troops' bodies. This caused command groups to begin talks regarding a new suit to act as a replacement for the old one. Push for such a program further gained popularity as the Auriellen Security Council Intelligence Center and the Cascadan State Intelligence Directorate identified three facilities within the far reaches of Level 107 that had been utilized by the KHL to create drugs and chemical agents. Cascadan agents operating within the facilities also uncovered attempts to revitalize or reverse engineer the virusThe ''Gravis Inclinationis Geneticae'', simply known as GIG, is a virus exclusive to Level 107 that "consumes" all bits of evolving DNA strands, indirectly speeding up the evolution process by amplifying the mutations that would've occured across millions of years. that hastened the divergence from humans to Cascadans. Subsequently, the Federal Assembly of Defense opened up the Noviscu Asquistea per Medius PericluvosNew Hazardous Environment Uniform Program in response to concerns of assaulting forces catching the biological agents and spreading it. Servon Dynamics and Yü-ērfòu Dē Hángōkai collaborated, creating the CLIMP and additional parts that would form part of the AVMH. The Servon Dynamics–Yü-ērfòu Dē Hángōkai team was elected and received a contract to supply Aurielle and Cascada with 11,000 AVMHs. ==CLPIMP== The Costem Liero Protela Integratem per Medius PericluvosIntegrated Hazardous Environment Protective Lightweight Suit (CLPIMP; colloquial: CLIMP, CLIP) is the primary part of the AVMH. The CLIMP overgarment includes the coat and trousers. Both pieces have an outer layer of Aramid Fibers, a mid-layer of Butyl Rubber Composite, and an inner layer of Activated Carbon Lining; most materials are recycled from unused or recycled military hardware, making it significantly cheaper to purchase and maintain. The overgarment comes in MultiCam, desert, and woodland camouflage, alongside an orange-ish color used exclusively by Auriellen Security Council Special Forces Operational Detachment—Detail E (ASCSFOD—D/E). Military personnel often wrap [https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chemical_Agent_Detector_Paper#M9_Detector_Tape M9 Detector Tape] on the bicep of one of their arms, or left leg for chemical agent detection. The CLIMP provides resistance against tears, stabs, and slashes; additionally, certain models of the CLIMP, such as the one used by Detail E, have better heat resistance. ==Variants== *ETD-8 AMVH: Standard protective gear in use by Aurielle and Rama Saom. *ETD/CAS-8 AMVH: Made specifically to fit Cascadan users; CLIMP has adaptations to fit the tail, ears, and fur of Cascadans. *ETD-8MS AMVH: CLIMP includes a built-in morphine administrator. *ETD-8CS/E AMVH: ACSFOD—D/E variant; improved fire and chemical resistance. ==Users== *[[File:Republic of Aurielle New.png|25px]] Republic of Aurielle: In service with all branches of the Auriellen military. *[[File:Rama Saom.png|25px]] Rama Saom: Used by Rama Saom Security Department's Rapid Response Unit, Strategic Deployment Force and Special Tasks Squadron. *[[File:Duxeam di Cascadea.png|25px]] Duchy of Cascada: In service with the Cascadan Army and Cascadan Special Operations Command. ===Potential Users=== *[[File:Anti-EntityAgencyLogo.png|25px]] AEG: The Republic of Aurielle has offered the sell the AMVH to the AEG for entity-clearing operations in dangerous levels. *[[File:C9ea4c76-520c-46a6-9879-22fa279f95dd cropped.png|25px]] Backrooms Investigation Foundation: Aurielle reportedly proposed a plan for a deal between them and the BIF for acquisition of the AMVH to investigate CBRN related matters. {{Footnotes}} __NOTOC__ ---- {{Collapse|initial='''+ Show Author Information'''|final='''- Close Author Information'''|body= new Author and artist: [[User:Dulling|Dulling]]
